name: Test NMT service accepts valid JWT token
description:
Verify NMT service processes request with valid JWT token

        Use Case:
        - User provides a valid JWT token (admin-created, used like API key)
        - NMT service should successfully process the translation request

        Endpoint: POST /api/v1/nmt/inference
        Auth: Valid JWT Bearer token (from VALID_TEST_TOKEN env var)
        Expected:
        - 200 OK
        - Response contains translation result
descriptionHtml:
Verify NMT service processes request with valid JWT token

    Use Case:
    - User provides a valid JWT token (admin-created, used like API key)
    - NMT service should successfully process the translation request

    Endpoint: POST /api/v1/nmt/inference
    Auth: Valid JWT Bearer token (from VALID_TEST_TOKEN env var)
    Expected:
    - 200 OK
    - Response contains translation result
